alerts.title: CopilotKit raises $27M to help devs deploy app-native AI agents
alerts.description: The Seattle-based startup's Series A round was led by Glilot Capital, NFX, and SignalFire, TechCrunch has exclusively learned.

alerts.title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5 Instant, a new default model for ChatGPT
alerts.description: The company said the model reduces hallucination in sensitive areas such as law, medicine, and finance, while maintaining the low latency of its predecessor.

alerts.title: Sierra raises $950M as the race to own enterprise AI gets serious
alerts.description: The raise gives Sierra more than $1 billion to work with — capital the company says it will use to become the "global standard" for AI-powered customer experiences.

alerts.title: Scout AI Raises $100M to Build ‘AI Brain' for Autonomous Warfare
alerts.description: The fund raise comes as the White House pushes AI dominance across industries, including defense.

alerts.title: DeepSeek-V4 Could Change Global AI Model Race
alerts.description: The model maker released two versions of V4, both of which are open, cheap and use Huawei's AI chips for inference.

alerts.title: GPT-5.5 Boasts Coding Advancements, But Falls Short of Opus 4.7
alerts.description: While OpenAI has improved the model's coding and tool use ability, it still has room to improve in areas where Anthropic dominates.

alerts.title: OpenAI GPT-5.4-Cyber is More Open Than Claude Mythos
alerts.description: The model could help cybersecurity experts better prepare for attacks.

alerts.title: Andy Jassy says Amazon investors will be rewarded by all its AI spending
alerts.description: CEO Andy Jassy said Amazon’s massive AI spending reflects a once-in-a-generation opportunity and will ultimately reward investors.

alerts.title: Bret Taylor's Sierra raises nearly $1 billion months after last capital push
alerts.description: Sierra's $950 million Series E funding round was led by Tiger and Google's GV, with participation from Benchmark, Sequoia, Greenoaks and others.

alerts.title: AI chipmaker Cerebras targets $3.5 billion raise in IPO
alerts.description: The share sale could give the company a valuation of up to $24.5 billion, compared with $23 billion as of February.

alerts.title: OpenAI turns its sold-out GPT-5.5 party into a monthlong Codex giveaway for 8,000 developers
alerts.description: OpenAI on Monday began emailing more than 8,000 developers who applied for its invite-only GPT-5.5 party with a surprise consolation prize: a tenfold increase in Codex rate limits on their pers
